dashboard.label: ICP-SW01 Network Switch Monitor
dashboard.description: Meraki MS355-48X2 | Serial: Q2DY-GJ53-PCYT | ICP Building | 56 Ports | 6 Active Devices

search.query: index=main sourcetype="meraki:switch_port_status" serial="Q2DY-GJ53-PCYT" | stats dc(portId) as total_ports count(eval(status="Connected")) as connected | eval display=connected." / ".total_ports | table display
index=main sourcetype="meraki:switch_port_status" serial="Q2DY-GJ53-PCYT" | stats sum(trafficInKbps.total) as total_traffic | eval total_traffic=round(total_traffic,1) | table total_traffic
index=main sourcetype="meraki:switch_port_status" serial="Q2DY-GJ53-PCYT" | stats sum(powerUsageInWh) as total_poe | eval total_poe=round(total_poe,1) | table total_poe
index=main sourcetype="meraki:switch_port_status" serial="Q2DY-GJ53-PCYT" portId="48" | sort - _time | head 1 | eval display=round('trafficInKbps.total',1) | table display
index=main sourcetype="meraki:switch_port_status" serial="Q2DY-GJ53-PCYT" | sort - _time | head 1 | head 1 | table device_name model serial

index=main sourcetype="meraki:switch_port_status" serial="Q2DY-GJ53-PCYT" status="Connected" | sort - _time | dedup portId | eval device_name=coalesce('lldp.systemName','cdp.platform',"Unknown") | eval traffic_kbps=round('trafficInKbps.total',1) | eval sent_kbps=round('trafficInKbps.sent',1) | eval recv_kbps=round('trafficInKbps.recv',1) | eval poe_wh=round(powerUsageInWh,1) | eval poe_status=if('poe.isAllocated'="true","✓ PoE","—") | eval clients=clientCount | eval port_type=case( portId=="48","🔗 Uplink/Router", portId=="43" OR portId=="45","📡 Access Point", portId=="1" OR portId=="2" OR portId=="13","📷 Camera", true(),"Device") | table portId device_name port_type speed traffic_kbps sent_kbps recv_kbps poe_wh poe_status clients | rename portId as Port device_name as "Device" port_type as "Type" speed as "Speed" traffic_kbps as "Total (Kbps)" sent_kbps as "TX (Kbps)" recv_kbps as "RX (Kbps)" poe_wh as "PoE (Wh)" poe_status as "PoE" clients as "Clients" | sort Port

chart.title: ICP-SW01 - Traffic Per Device Over Time (Kbps)

search.query: index=main sourcetype="meraki:switch_port_status" serial="Q2DY-GJ53-PCYT" status="Connected" | eval device_name=case( portId=="1","P1: Corner Camera", portId=="2","P2: Table Camera", portId=="13","P13: Bookshelf Camera", portId=="43","P43: Kitchen WAP", portId=="45","P45: Intern WAP", portId=="48","P48: MX105 Uplink", true(),"Port ".portId) | timechart span=10m avg(trafficInKbps.total) by device_name

chart.title: ICP-SW01 - Uplink TX vs RX (Port 48 - MX105)

search.query: index=main sourcetype="meraki:switch_port_status" serial="Q2DY-GJ53-PCYT" portId="48" | timechart span=10m avg(trafficInKbps.sent) as "TX (Kbps)" avg(trafficInKbps.recv) as "RX (Kbps)"

index=main sourcetype="meraki:switch_port_status" serial="Q2DY-GJ53-PCYT" status="Connected" | eval device_name=case( portId=="1","P1: Corner Camera", portId=="2","P2: Table Camera", portId=="13","P13: Bookshelf Camera", portId=="43","P43: Kitchen WAP", portId=="45","P45: Intern WAP", portId=="48","P48: MX105", true(),"Port ".portId) | where powerUsageInWh > 0 | timechart span=1h avg(powerUsageInWh) by device_name

index=main sourcetype="meraki:switch_port_status" serial="Q2DY-GJ53-PCYT" (portId="43" OR portId="45") | eval device_name=case( portId=="43","Kitchen WAP (MR57)", portId=="45","Intern Desk WAP (MR57)") | timechart span=10m avg(trafficInKbps.total) by device_name

index=main sourcetype="meraki:switch_port_status" serial="Q2DY-GJ53-PCYT" (portId="1" OR portId="2" OR portId="13") | eval device_name=case( portId=="1","Corner Of Office (MV12W)", portId=="2","Table Test (MV12W)", portId=="13","Bookshelf (MV12W)") | timechart span=10m avg(trafficInKbps.total) by device_name

chart.title: ICP-SW01 - Total Switch Traffic Over Time (Kbps)

search.query: index=main sourcetype="meraki:switch_port_status" serial="Q2DY-GJ53-PCYT" | timechart span=10m sum(trafficInKbps.total) as "Total Traffic (Kbps)" sum(trafficInKbps.sent) as "Total TX (Kbps)" sum(trafficInKbps.recv) as "Total RX (Kbps)"

chart.title: ICP-SW01 - Total PoE Power Over Time (Wh)

search.query: index=main sourcetype="meraki:switch_port_status" serial="Q2DY-GJ53-PCYT" | timechart span=1h sum(powerUsageInWh) as "Total PoE (Wh)"
index=main sourcetype="meraki:switch_port_status" serial="Q2DY-GJ53-PCYT" portId="48" | timechart span=1h avg(trafficInKbps.total) as uplink_traffic | anomalydetection uplink_traffic action=annotate

index=main sourcetype="meraki:switch_port_status" serial="Q2DY-GJ53-PCYT" | where errors!="[]" AND errors!="" | eval device_name=coalesce('lldp.systemName','cdp.platform',"Port ".portId) | eval time=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | table time portId device_name errors warnings status | rename time as Time portId as Port device_name as Device errors as Errors warnings as Warnings status as Status | sort - Time

index=main sourcetype="meraki:switch_port_status" serial="Q2DY-GJ53-PCYT" status="Connected" | sort - _time | dedup portId | eval device_name=coalesce('lldp.systemName','cdp.platform',"Unknown") | eval device_desc=coalesce('lldp.systemDescription','cdp.platform',"—") | eval mgmt_ip=coalesce('lldp.managementAddress','cdp.address',"—") | eval mac=coalesce('lldp.chassisId','cdp.deviceId',"—") | eval traffic_kbps=round('trafficInKbps.total',1) | eval poe_wh=round(powerUsageInWh,1) | eval uplink=if(portId=="48","✓ Uplink","—") | table portId device_name device_desc mgmt_ip mac speed traffic_kbps poe_wh uplink | rename portId as Port device_name as "Device Name" device_desc as "Description" mgmt_ip as "Mgmt IP" mac as "MAC/Chassis ID" speed as Speed traffic_kbps as "Traffic (Kbps)" poe_wh as "PoE (Wh)" uplink as "Uplink" | sort Port
